2026-0673
2026-06-25ECCCParks Canada Agency ActAppointment of the Interim Chief Executive Officer of the Parks Canada AgencyAppointment of Andrew Campbell of Ottawa, Ontario, to be interim Chief Executive Officer of the Parks Canada Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of six months or until such time as a new Chief Executive Officer is appointed, whichever occurs first.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Interim Chief Executive Officer of the Parks Canada Agency
precis: Appointment of Andrew Campbell of Ottawa, Ontario, to be interim Chief Executive Officer of the Parks Canada Agency, to hold office during pleasure for a term of six months or until such time as a new Chief Executive Officer is appointed, whichever occurs first.
